Lehigh Acres Home Loans

FHA loans in Lehigh Acres, Florida

Lehigh Acres is one of Southwest Florida's most affordable communities and a hotbed of new and spec-home construction. For FHA buyers, that's an ideal combination: prices that sit comfortably under the loan limit, and brand-new homes that meet FHA's property standards easily. It's a popular choice for first-time buyers and families priced out of nearby Fort Myers and the coast.

Lee County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

Minimum down3.5%

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Lehigh Acres

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Lehigh Acres home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Lehigh Acres' very affordable market, that covers virtually all homes — including the area's abundant new construction. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Lee County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable new construction in Lehigh Acres

Lehigh Acres is built for FHA buyers: lots of new single-family homes at prices well within the loan limit, perfect for first-time buyers. New construction passes the FHA appraisal cleanly, and you can pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds to get in with very little out of pocket. Use our calculator to estimate your payment.

Down payment help for Lehigh Acres buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Lehigh Acres buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Lee County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Lehigh Acres

We help buyers throughout Lehigh Acres and Lee County, including Lehigh Acres and the surrounding Lee County communities. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Lehigh Acres (Lee County) for 2026?+
Lee County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers virtually all Lehigh Acres homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Lehigh Acres good for FHA buyers?+
Very — it's one of Southwest Florida's most affordable markets, with lots of new construction that meets FHA standards.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Lehigh Acres?+
Yes — new homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit well within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Lehigh Acres?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Lee County?+
Yes — Lehigh Acres, Fort Myers, Cape Coral, and surrounding communities.
